arts.ttl: Exclusive: Man United set €65m asking price for first-team star as Euro giants on alert
arts.sum: Manchester United have set an asking price of around €65m for misfiring young striker Rasmus Hojlund as clubs show an interest in him ahead of the summer. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that the Red Devils are open to letting Hojlund go if interested clubs pay up for him. arts.ttl: Amorim watched '99 doc before wild Utd comeback
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim said he watched Manchester United's 1999 documentary for "inspiration" before his team fought back to record a stunning victory over Lyon.

arts.ttl: Victor Lindelof left Old Trafford due to 'personal issue' forcing Ruben Amorim reshuffle
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Victor Lindelof was supposed to come on as a half-time substitute against Lyon but he was forced to leave Old Trafford to deal with a personal issue

arts.ttl: Man United star Amad baffles fans after sharing bizarre X-rated social media post inside Old Trafford dressing room following Red Devils' remarkable Europa League comeback
arts.sum: Amad, who missed the match through injury, showed players had been swept up in the drama as much as supporters as he shared a photo from inside Man United's dressing room post match.
